# CCAF Mock Exam

This is the Claude Certified Architect Mock Exam application.
It is an advanced Single Page Application (SPA) built with Vanilla TypeScript, Vite, Supabase, and Web Components.
Features include offline-first synchronization with IndexedDB, dynamic module federation, comprehensive anti-cheat telemetry, and 100% strict type safety.
You can view the source code at [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/zintaen/claude-certified-architect-mock-exam).
